name: part_005
file: tmp_【 3D LIVE 】ゲストもたくさん❕重大告知アリ❕みんなで楽しも🍙💜💜【 #猫又おかゆ生誕祭2026 】 [rYpbqdD1oiQ]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_005.webm

scenes.description: Nekomata Okayu and Ninomae Ina'nis perform 'Darling'.
Transition to the next song performance.
Nekomata Okayu and Shigure Ui perform 'Dokimeki Diary'.
Transition to the next song performance.
Nekomata Okayu and La+ Darknesss perform 'Bokura wa Minna Imi Fumei'.

subtitles.original: …も聞いてないってダーリン
subtitles.english: ...not listening to a word, Darling.

subtitles.original: ベタな恋愛　エラな展開
subtitles.english: A cliché romance, a flawed development.

subtitles.original: だってそれじゃつまらないでしょ
subtitles.english: Because that would be boring, wouldn't it?

subtitles.original: 踏みつけて　焼き付けて
subtitles.english: Trample it down, sear it in.

subtitles.original: とろけそうな　三叉神経
subtitles.english: A trigeminal nerve about to melt.

subtitles.original: 壊れそうな　群居本能
subtitles.english: A gregarious instinct about to break.

subtitles.original: 崩れそうな　楔を前に
subtitles.english: Before a wedge about to crumble.

subtitles.original: 愛の呪い　レボリューション
subtitles.english: The curse of love, a revolution.

subtitles.original: ドキメキ　メキキリュウに
subtitles.english: On the thumping current...

subtitles.original: 私は乗っている　きっとね
subtitles.english: ...I am riding, I'm sure.

subtitles.original:
ドキメキダイアリー
作詞・作曲：Chinozo
subtitles.english:
Dokimeki Diary
Lyrics/Music: Chinozo

subtitles.original: なんか言葉にできないこと
subtitles.english: Things I can't quite put into words.

subtitles.original: ちょっと心臓さわぐこと
subtitles.english: Things that make my heart flutter a bit.

subtitles.original: なんとなく今日照らすこと
subtitles.english: Things that somehow brighten the day.

subtitles.original: ちょっと好みの花見つけた
subtitles.english: I found a flower I like a little.

subtitles.original: 広いけれど　かりそめだってさ
subtitles.english: It's vast, but they say it's ephemeral.

subtitles.original: 欲しいものさえ探せないよ
subtitles.english: I can't even find the things I want.

subtitles.original: ワクワクしたそのダイアリー
subtitles.english: That diary I was so excited about...

subtitles.original: セラムンぷりして放り出すなんて
subtitles.english: ...acting all cool and throwing it away.

subtitles.original: イヤイヤイヤイヤ
subtitles.english: No, no, no, no...

subtitles.original:
やるせなくなっちゃうわ
woh-oh woh-oh-oh
subtitles.english:
...it just makes me feel helpless.
woh-oh woh-oh-oh

subtitles.original: でもだけどきっと可能性あり
subtitles.english: But still, there's surely a possibility.

subtitles.original: 気持ちいい風に浮遊して
subtitles.english: Floating on a pleasant breeze.

subtitles.original: ずっとずっとちょっともっといつかは飛べたらいいな
subtitles.english: I wish I could fly away someday, further and further.

subtitles.original: ドキメキ　メキキリュウに
subtitles.english: On the thumping current...

subtitles.original: 私は乗っている　きっとね
subtitles.english: ...I am riding, I'm sure.

subtitles.original: わからない物語にビビらないで
subtitles.english: Don't be afraid of the unknown story.

subtitles.original: キラキラ空想に
subtitles.english: In a sparkling fantasy...

subtitles.original: 世界が踊る　笑って
subtitles.english: ...the world dances. Smile!

subtitles.original: 縮こまってる時間はないな
subtitles.english: There's no time to be shrinking back.

subtitles.original: 私を知りたい
subtitles.english: I want to know myself.

subtitles.original: 何もかもがまだわからないないない
subtitles.english: I don't know anything at all yet.

subtitles.original: 私は見つけたい
subtitles.english: I want to find it.

subtitles.original: 「行ってきます」を声にできたなら
subtitles.english: If only I could say, "I'm heading out."

subtitles.original: ちょっとだけ大人になったかもね
subtitles.english: Maybe I've become a little bit of an adult.

subtitles.original: ちゃっちゃかちゃ深呼吸
subtitles.english: Taking deep breaths, one by one.

subtitles.original: 優しく歩くたび失速
subtitles.english: Slowing down every time I walk gently.

subtitles.original: つまんない筆跡は夢がない
subtitles.english: Boring handwriting lacks dreams.

subtitles.original: ちょっとキライな自分見つけた
subtitles.english: I found a part of myself I dislike a bit.

subtitles.original: 黒い霧を追って雨に打たれて
subtitles.english: Chasing the black mist, caught in the rain...

subtitles.original: 帰りたくなるの
subtitles.english: ...I just want to go home.

subtitles.original: ワクワクしたそのダイアリー
subtitles.english: That diary I was so excited about...

subtitles.original: 少し浮かされて走り出すなんて
subtitles.english: ...starting to run, feeling a bit uplifted.

subtitles.original: マイアイアイアイアイ
subtitles.english: My, ay-ay-ay-ay...

subtitles.original:
遮二無二で行こうわ
woh-oh woh-oh-oh
subtitles.english:
...let's go forward recklessly!
woh-oh woh-oh-oh

subtitles.original: お気にのアクセはなくしたくないの
subtitles.english: I don't want to lose my favorite accessory.

subtitles.original: woh-oh woh-oh-oh
subtitles.english: woh-oh woh-oh-oh

subtitles.original: まだ何も分かっちゃいないんだ
subtitles.english: I don't understand anything yet.

subtitles.original: woh-oh woh-oh-oh
subtitles.english: woh-oh woh-oh-oh

subtitles.original: 好きって気持ちに向かいたい
subtitles.english: I want to head towards that feeling of love.

subtitles.original: あの星のように輝きたい　oh
subtitles.english: I want to shine like that star, oh.

subtitles.original: ドキメキ　メキキリュウに
subtitles.english: On the thumping current...

subtitles.original: 私は乗っている　きっとね
subtitles.english: ...I am riding, I'm sure.

subtitles.original:
やっぱりイヤイヤイヤイヤ
答えのない世界で生きてるせいです
subtitles.english:
After all, it's no, no, no, no...
all because we live in a world with no answers.

subtitles.original: 未来は優秀に
subtitles.english: The future is excellent...

subtitles.original: 待っても変わらないし　叫んで
subtitles.english: ...but it won't change if you just wait. Shout out!

subtitles.original: 私らしくありたい
subtitles.english: I want to be myself.

subtitles.original: ドキメキ　メキキリュウを
subtitles.english: Beyond the thumping current...

subtitles.original: 乗り越えた先には
subtitles.english: ...that I've overcome...

subtitles.original:
イヤイヤイヤイヤ
わからない物語が待っている
subtitles.english:
...no, no, no, no,
an unknown story awaits.

subtitles.original: 小さな勇気で　何かを変えよう
subtitles.english: Let's change something with a little courage.

subtitles.original: あーね
subtitles.english: Right.

subtitles.original: 大切な話があるんだ
subtitles.english: I have something important to tell you.

subtitles.original: ここにない探しものがあるんだ
subtitles.english: There's something I'm looking for that isn't here.

subtitles.original: だから旅に出ます
subtitles.english: So, I'm going on a journey.

subtitles.original: そのうち帰ります
subtitles.english: I'll be back eventually.

subtitles.original: ちょっとだけ大人になったかもね
subtitles.english: Maybe I've become a little bit of an adult.

subtitles.original:
ぼくらはみんな意味不明
作詞・作曲：ピノキオピー
subtitles.english:
Bokura wa Minna Imi Fumei
Lyrics/Music: PinocchioP

subtitles.original: ぼくらはみんな意味不明
subtitles.english: We're all incomprehensible.

subtitles.original: 夜が明ける
subtitles.english: Night breaks.

subtitles.original: 朝目覚める
subtitles.english: Wake up in the morning.

subtitles.original: 首痛めるこの身体に自分がいる
subtitles.english: I'm in this body with a sore neck.

subtitles.original: 君と喋る
subtitles.english: Talk to you.

subtitles.original: 飯を食べる
subtitles.english: Eat a meal.

subtitles.original: 服を着てるそのすべてが不気味である
subtitles.english: Wearing clothes, all of it is eerie.

subtitles.original: なんか変だ　変だ　変だ変だ
subtitles.english: Something's strange, strange, strange, strange.

subtitles.original: 駅の改札通り抜ける
subtitles.english: Passing through the station ticket gate.

subtitles.original: こんな平和　平和　平和平和
subtitles.english: Such peace, peace, peace, peace.

subtitles.original: 当たり前で受ける
subtitles.english: Accepted as a matter of course.

subtitles.original: 猫の名前はなんとなくタマで
subtitles.english: The cat's name is somehow Tama.

subtitles.original: 犬の…
subtitles.english: The dog's...
